channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Road sign fell on the floor and caused my tyre’s damage, 25th March
item.description:
While I was driving down the hill there was some road work, I did not notice the sign was on the floor looks like the wind dropped it, I could not avoid it as there was other cars parked waiting for the temporary traffic light to go green and could not use the emergency stop causing damage to the previous cars so I had no choice but to drive on the sign, my tyre popped on the sport I had to emergency park on the side and called the emergency tyre fitting, they charged me £185 to fix the tyre. Im requiring a compensation of the repair and the two hours that prevented me from varying my work.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wightman Road, Harringay, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reported bin bottom of Z on Dallin Rd, overflowing two weeks ago. Will continue to happen as other bin on Z removes, 25th March
item.description:
OVER Flowing Bin Other Bin removed . The reason for this: encourages Fly tipping! So now have Overflowing bin and Fly Tipping. As reported recently

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plum Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street sign damaged, 24th March
item.description:
Hi. All the ‘Brightling Road’ street signs are damaged, mouldy and blackened and need replacing. I’ve attached one picture but please change all 4 (left and right side of street, top and bottom of street). This has been like this for several years now. I’ve complained previously to the council but nothing has been done and it’s getting worse. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brightling Road, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
